summary: Critical: actions/checkout@v4 not pinned to commit SHA (requirement: 'pinned action refs with version comment'). Dead code in steps 5-6: `echo validator_exit=$?` captured but never used (lines 40-45, 47-52). Workflow hardcodes CONFIG_PATH ('fixtures/active.json', line 10) instead of accepting flexible fixture input for test harness. Markdown formatting in validator.ts repetitive: three ~30-line blocks with identical structure (expired/warning/ok, lines ~90–120). Otherwise: solid TypeScript with explicit types, good error handling, reasonable separation of concerns.
